name: PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk
summary: PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk produces and sells steel products in Indonesia and internationally. The company offers slabs, blooms, beam blanks, and billets; coil plates and derivatives; and steel profiles and derivatives, as well as hot steel coils and steel plates. It serves bridge, building, and other projects. The company was formerly known as PT Gunung Naga Mas and changed its name to PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk in 1991. PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk was founded in 1990 and is headquartered in Bekasi, Indonesia. PT Gunung Raja Paksi Tbk is a subsidiary of Orientstar Pte. Ltd.
